non_essential_assertions.text: assert a[i] == target;  // SMT QUIRK: A1 existential witness
assert maxVal in a[..i+1];  // SMT QUIRK: A1 existential witness (maxVal exists in prefix)
non_essential_assertions.quirk_comment: // SMT QUIRK: A1 existential witness (maxVal exists in prefix)

non_essential_assertions.text: assert a[..|a|] == a;  // SMT QUIRK: B1 take-full
assert 0 <= i < |a| && a[i] == target;  // SMT QUIRK: A1 existential witness
assert Contains(a, target);
assert a[..i+1] == a[..i] + [a[i]];  // SMT QUIRK: B1 sequence extensionality
assert a[..|a|] == a;  // SMT QUIRK: B1 take-full
assert Eligible(ages[i], scores[i]);  // SMT QUIRK: A2 predicate instantiation
assert InRange(a[i], lo, hi) <==> (lo <= a[i] <= hi);  // SMT QUIRK: A2 predicate instantiation
assert !AllInRange(a[..i+1], lo, hi);  // SMT QUIRK: A2 predicate propagation
assert a[..i+1] == a[..i] + [a[i]];  // SMT QUIRK: B1 sequence extensionality
assert a[..|a|] == a;  // SMT QUIRK: B1 take-full
assert a[..i+2] == a[..i+1] + [a[i+1]];  // SMT QUIRK: B1 extensionality
assert !Sorted(a[..i+2]);  // SMT QUIRK: A2 predicate instantiation
assert a[..i+2] == a[..|a|][..i+2];  // SMT QUIRK: subsequence reasoning
assert a[..i+2] == a[..i+1] + [a[i+1]];  // SMT QUIRK: B1 extensionality
assert a[..|a|] == a;  // SMT QUIRK: B1 take-full
assert !InSeq(a[i], b);  // SMT QUIRK: A1 connect loop result to predicate
non_essential_assertions.quirk_comment: // SMT QUIRK: A1 connect loop result to predicate

non_essential_assertions.text: assert InSeq(a[i], a);  // SMT QUIRK: A1 existential witness
assert AllUnique(existing);  // SMT QUIRK: A2 predicate needed after sequence extension
non_essential_assertions.quirk_comment: // SMT QUIRK: A2 predicate needed after sequence extension

non_essential_assertions.text: assert F(a[i]) == a[i] * a[i];  // SMT QUIRK: C1 NLA — need to unfold F for comparison
non_essential_assertions.quirk_comment: // SMT QUIRK: C1 NLA — need to unfold F for comparison

non_essential_assertions.text: assert F(a[i+1]) == a[i+1] * a[i+1];  // SMT QUIRK: C1 NLA

essential_assertions.text: assert a[lo..i+1] == a[lo..i] + [a[i]];  // SMT QUIRK: B1 sequence extensionality

non_essential_assertions.text: assert a[lo..hi] == a[lo..hi];  // help close the loop

essential_assertions.text: assert values[..i+1] == values[..i] + [values[i]];      // SMT QUIRK: B1 extensionality
assert weights[..i+1] == weights[..i] + [weights[i]];    // SMT QUIRK: B1 extensionality
assert values[..|values|] == values;    // SMT QUIRK: B1 take-full
assert weights[..|weights|] == weights;  // SMT QUIRK: B1 take-full
assert a[..i+1] == a[..i] + [a[i]];  // SMT QUIRK: B1 sequence extensionality
assert a[..|a|] == a;  // SMT QUIRK: B1 take-full
assert a[..i+1] == a[..i] + [a[i]];  // SMT QUIRK: B1 sequence extensionality

non_essential_assertions.text: assert AllPositive(result);  // SMT QUIRK: A2 predicate re-instantiation after append
non_essential_assertions.quirk_comment: // SMT QUIRK: A2 predicate re-instantiation after append

essential_assertions.text: assert a[..i+1] == a[..i] + [a[i]];  // SMT QUIRK: B1 sequence extensionality
assert a[..|a|] == a;  // SMT QUIRK: B1 take-full
assert seqs[..i+1] == seqs[..i] + [seqs[i]];  // SMT QUIRK: B1 sequence extensionality
assert seqs[..|seqs|] == seqs;  // SMT QUIRK: B1 take-full

non_essential_assertions.text: assert forall j :: 0 <= j < |result| ==> result[j] == a[|a| - 1 - j];
assert result[|result|-1] == a[i];  // SMT QUIRK: property of appended element
non_essential_assertions.quirk_comment: // After append, old elements keep their values

essential_assertions.text: assert a[..i+1] == a[..i] + [a[i]];  // SMT QUIRK: B1 sequence extensionality
assert b[..i+1] == b[..i] + [b[i]];  // SMT QUIRK: B1 sequence extensionality (both seqs)
essential_assertions.quirk_comment: // SMT QUIRK: B1 sequence extensionality (both seqs)

essential_assertions.text: assert a[..|a|] == a;  // SMT QUIRK: B1 take-full
assert b[..|b|] == b;  // SMT QUIRK: B1 take-full
assert a[..i+1] == a[..i] + [a[i]];  // SMT QUIRK: B1 sequence extensionality
assert a[..|a|] == a;  // SMT QUIRK: B1 take-full

non_essential_assertions.text: assert width >= 1 && height >= 1;  // SMT QUIRK: C1 NLA — Z3 can't prove a*b > 0 from a>0, b>0
non_essential_assertions.quirk_comment: // SMT QUIRK: C1 NLA — Z3 can't prove a*b > 0 from a>0, b>0

non_essential_assertions.text: assert row * numCols >= 0;  // SMT QUIRK: C1 NLA — needs hint for non-negative product
non_essential_assertions.quirk_comment: // SMT QUIRK: C1 NLA — needs hint for non-negative product

essential_assertions.text: assert prices[..i+1] == prices[..i] + [prices[i]];    // SMT QUIRK: B1 extensionality
assert quantities[..i+1] == quantities[..i] + [quantities[i]];  // SMT QUIRK: B1 extensionality
assert prices[..|prices|] == prices;        // SMT QUIRK: B1 take-full
assert quantities[..|quantities|] == quantities;  // SMT QUIRK: B1 take-full
